MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF NASIR SHEIKH'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement IS DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT SERVICE. NOTICE SERVED BY MAIL ON OCTOBER 24, 2007. EARLIEST MOTION COULD BE HEARD IS NOVEMBER 26, 2007. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Judge: John K. Stewart, Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR # 11055

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
Plaintiff: Nasir Sheikh and Defendant: Michael Borichevsky, are present in pro per.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff agreed to pays to the Defendant the sum of $1,200.00 within one week for move out expenses, in exchanged for Defendant to vacate within 6 weeks from the subject premises.
Defendant agreed to keeps the terms of the settlement confidential.
Matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
